2605.06341.title: CoupleEvo: Evolving Heuristics for Coupled Optimization Problems Using Large Language Models
2605.06341.paper_summary: Many real-world optimization problems consist of multiple tightly coupled subproblems whose solutions must be coordinated to achieve high overall performance. However, existing large language model driven automated heuristic design approaches are limited to single-problem settings. In this paper, we propose CoupleEvo. CoupleEvo proposes three evolutionary coordination strategies to evolve heuristics for coupled optimization problems: the sequential strategy evolves heuristics for one subproblem after the other; the iterative strategy alternates the evolution of heuristics for different subproblems over successive generations; and the integrated strategy evolves heuristics for all problems simultaneously. The approach is evaluated on two representative coupled optimization problems. Experimental results show that decomposition-based strategies (sequential and iterative) provide more stable convergence and higher solution quality, while the integrated evolution strategy suffers from increased search complexity and variability. These findings highlight the importance of coordinating evolutionary search across interdependent subproblems and demonstrate the potential of LLM-driven heuristic design for complex coupled optimization problems. The code is available: https://github.com/tb-git-kit-research/CoupleEvo.
2605.06341.paper_summary_zh: 許多現實世界的優化問題由多個緊密耦合的子問題組成，其解決方案必須協調以實現高整體性能。<lb/>然而，現有的大型語言模型驅動的自動啟發式設計方法僅限於單一問題設置。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了CoupleEvo。<lb/>CoupleEvo提出了三種進化協調策略，以針對耦合優化問題進化啟發式：順序策略依次為每個子問題進化啟發式；迭代策略在連續世代中交替進化不同子問題的啟發式；而綜合策略則同時為所有問題進化啟發式。<lb/>該方法在兩個具有代表性的耦合優化問題上進行了評估。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，基於分解的策略（順序和迭代）提供了更穩定的收斂性和更高的解決方案質量，而綜合進化策略則面臨搜索複雜性和變異性增加的問題。<lb/>這些發現突顯了在相互依賴的子問題之間協調進化搜索的重要性，並展示了LLM驅動的啟發式設計在複雜耦合優化問題中的潛力。<lb/>代碼可用於：https://github.com/tb-git-kit-research/CoupleEvo。
2605.06341.author: Thomas Bömer et.al.
2605.06341.authors: Thomas Bömer, Bastian Amberg, Max Disselnmeyer, Anne Meyer
